creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bsam
Date: Wed Sep 19 13:39:34 2012
New Revision: 304516
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304516

Log:
  Add trytond_stock_supply_forecast 2.4.0, tryton Application Platform
  (Stock Supply Forecast Module).
  
  PR:		ports/171444
  Submitted by:	matthias@petermann.it

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_forecast/
  head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_forecast/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_forecast/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_forecast/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_forecast/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 13:38:21 2012	(r304515)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 13:39:34 2012	(r304516)
@@ -145,6 +145,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_stock_split
     SUBDIR += trytond_stock_supply
     SUBDIR += trytond_stock_supply_day
+    SUBDIR += trytond_stock_supply_forecast
     SUBDIR += trytond_timesheet
     SUBDIR += venice
     SUBDIR += weberp

Added: head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_forecast/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_forecast/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 13:39:34 2012	(r304516)
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Created by: Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_stock_supply_forecast
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Stock Supply Forecast Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_stock_supply>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_stock_supply \
+		trytond_stock_forecast>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_stock_forecast
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_forecast/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_forecast/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 13:39:34 2012	(r304516)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_stock_supply_forecast-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 368300c1d2c6825b79ddf188ae856d989a6df9c3b4ea028fa0a4d482dcfeaf18
+SIZE (trytond_stock_supply_forecast-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 16517

Added: head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_forecast/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_forecast/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 13:39:34 2012	(r304516)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+This port adds the Stock Supply Forecast Module to the Tryton Application
+Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/

Added: head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_forecast/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_forecast/pkg-plist	Wed Sep 19 13:39:34 2012	(r304516)
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
